title: Chat System Upgraded
message:
We've upgraded our in-net chat system with new features and improved reliability.

What's new:

  • Faster, more reliable message delivery
  • Emoji reactions on messages (👍 ❤️ 😂 😮)
  • Inline image sharing
  • NCS/Loggers: enter commands directly in chat with / (e.g., /i W1ABC)

73 - KK6BEB
